title: Pike Finance - Rekt
relevance_summary: Storage vulnerability leading to contract misbehavior and fund siphoning via unprotected initializer functions

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls initialize() or upgradeToAndCall() with unprotected initializer functions.

red_flags: contract misbehavior due to storage vulnerability
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls initialize() or upgradeToAndCall() with unprotected initializer functions.
summary: Pike Finance fell victim to a storage vulnerability that allowed attackers to upgrade contracts and siphon funds. A guard could have detected and blocked the misuse of unprotected initializer functions.
